label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                    query_id,
                    user_name,
                    start_time,
                    end_time,
                    total_elapsed_time,
                    query_type,
                    query_tag,
                    query_text,
                    execution_status,
                    rows_produced
                FROM SNOWFLAKE.ACCOUNT_USAGE.QUERY_HISTORY
                WHERE start_time >= DATEADD(day, -90, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
                ORDER BY start_time DESC
                LIMIT 5000

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                    table_schema,
                    table_name,
                    view_definition
                FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.VIEWS
                WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
                  
                ORDER BY table_schema, table_name

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                    function_schema,
                    function_name,
                    function_definition,
                    function_language,
                    data_type AS return_type
                FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.FUNCTIONS
                WHERE function_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
                  
                ORDER BY function_schema, function_name

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                    procedure_schema,
                    procedure_name,
                    procedure_definition,
                    procedure_language
                FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PROCEDURES
                WHERE procedure_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
                  
                ORDER BY procedure_schema, procedure_name

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                        table_schema,
                        table_name,
                        constraint_name,
                        constraint_type
                    FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS
                    WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
                    ORDER BY table_schema, table_name, constraint_name

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                    tc.table_schema,
                    tc.table_name,
                    tc.constraint_name,
                    tc.constraint_type,
                    kcu.column_name,
                    kcu.referenced_table_schema AS ref_schema,
                    kcu.referenced_table_name AS ref_table,
                    kcu.referenced_column_name AS ref_column
                FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS tc
                LEFT JOIN (
                    SELECT
                        constraint_name,
                        table_schema,
                        table_name,
                        column_name,
                        NULL AS referenced_table_schema,
                        NULL AS referenced_table_name,
                        NULL AS referenced_column_name
                    FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
                ) kcu
                  ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name
                 AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema
                 AND tc.table_name = kcu.table_name
                WHERE tc.table_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
                  
                ORDER BY tc.table_schema, tc.table_name, tc.constraint_name

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                table_schema,
                table_name,
                column_name,
                ordinal_position,
                data_type,
                is_nullable,
                is_identity
            FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
            WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
              
            ORDER BY table_schema, table_name, ordinal_position

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                table_schema,
                table_name,
                row_count,
                bytes
            FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
            WHERE table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
              AND table_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
              
            ORDER BY table_schema, table_name

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT 
    DATE(START_TIME) AS usage_date,
    SUM(CREDITS_USED) AS credits_used
FROM SNOWFLAKE.ACCOUNT_USAGE.WAREHOUSE_METERING_HISTORY
GROUP BY DATE(START_TIME)
ORDER BY usage_date DESC;

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT 
    usage_date,
    SUM(credits_used) AS credits_used
FROM SNOWFLAKE.ACCOUNT_USAGE.WAREHOUSE_METERING_HISTORY
GROUP BY usage_date
ORDER BY usage_date DESC;

                    ORDER BY table_schema, table_name, constraint_name

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                    tc.table_schema,
                    tc.table_name,
                    tc.constraint_name,
                    tc.constraint_type,
                    kcu.column_name,
                    kcu.referenced_table_schema AS ref_schema,
                    kcu.referenced_table_name AS ref_table,
                    kcu.referenced_column_name AS ref_column
                FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLE_CONSTRAINTS tc
                LEFT JOIN (
                    SELECT
                        constraint_name,
                        table_schema,
                        table_name,
                        column_name,
                        NULL AS referenced_table_schema,
                        NULL AS referenced_table_name,
                        NULL AS referenced_column_name
                    FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.KEY_COLUMN_USAGE
                ) kcu
                  ON tc.constraint_name = kcu.constraint_name
                 AND tc.table_schema = kcu.table_schema
                 AND tc.table_name = kcu.table_name
                WHERE tc.table_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
                ORDER BY tc.table_schema, tc.table_name, tc.constraint_name

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                table_schema,
                table_name,
                column_name,
                ordinal_position,
                data_type,
                is_nullable,
                is_identity
            FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS
            WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
            ORDER BY table_schema, table_name, ordinal_position

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                table_schema,
                table_name,
                row_count,
                bytes
            FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.TABLES
            WHERE table_type = 'BASE TABLE'
              AND table_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
            ORDER BY table_schema, table_name

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                    query_id,
                    user_name,
                    start_time,
                    end_time,
                    total_elapsed_time,
                    query_type,
                    query_tag,
                    query_text,
                    execution_status,
                    rows_produced
                FROM SNOWFLAKE.ACCOUNT_USAGE.QUERY_HISTORY
                WHERE start_time >= DATEADD(day, -90, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP())
                ORDER BY start_time DESC
                LIMIT 5000

label: SELECT
sql:
SELECT
                    table_schema,
                    table_name,
                    view_definition
                FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.VIEWS
                WHERE table_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
                ORDER BY table_schema, table_name

label: SELECT
sql:

                    function_schema,
                    function_name,
                    function_definition,
                    function_language,
                    data_type AS return_type
                FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.FUNCTIONS
                WHERE function_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
                ORDER BY function_schema, function_name

                    procedure_schema,

                    procedure_language
                FROM SNOWFLAKE_SAMPLE_DATA.INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PROCEDURES
                WHERE procedure_schema NOT IN ('INFORMATION_SCHEMA')
                ORDER BY procedure_schema, procedure_name

label: ALTER

label: CREATE
sql: CREATE WORKSPACE IF NOT EXISTS IDENTIFIER('"USER$"."PUBLIC"."DEFAULT$"')

label: SHOW
sql: show SCHEMAS like 'RNANAVATY_LOAD_SAMPLE_DATA_FROM_S3' in DATABASE IDENTIFIER('"SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_DB"')

label: CREATE
sql: create SCHEMA IDENTIFIER('"SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_DB"."RNANAVATY_LOAD_SAMPLE_DATA_FROM_S3"') COMMENT = 'Schema created for tutorial execution'

label: SELECT
sql: SELECT is_database_role_in_session('COPILOT_USER') AS has_copilot_user, is_database_role_in_session('CORTEX_USER') AS has_cortex_user, is_database_role_in_session('CORTEX_AGENT_USER') AS has_cortex_agent_user

label: GRANT
sql: GRANT CREATE SCHEMA ON DATABASE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_DB') TO ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE')

label: GRANT
sql: GRANT USAGE ON DATABASE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_DB') TO ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE')

label: GRANT
sql: GRANT USAGE, MONITOR, OPERATE ON WAREHOUSE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_WH') TO ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE')

label: GRANT
sql: GRANT ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE') TO ROLE PUBLIC

label: CREATE_ROLE
sql: CREATE ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE') COMMENT='Created by Snowflake during account provisioning'

label: CREATE
sql: CREATE DATABASE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_DB') COMMENT='Created by Snowflake during account provisioning'

label: MULTI_STATEMENT
sql: CREATE DATABASE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_DB') COMMENT='Created by Snowflake during account provisioning'; CREATE ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE') COMMENT='Created by Snowflake during account provisioning'; GRANT ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE') TO ROLE PUBLIC; GRANT USAGE, MONITOR, OPERATE ON WAREHOUSE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_WH') TO ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE'); GRANT USAGE ON DATABASE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_DB') TO ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE'); GRANT CREATE SCHEMA ON DATABASE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_DB') TO ROLE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_ROLE');

label: CREATE
sql: CREATE OR REPLACE WAREHOUSE IDENTIFIER('SNOWFLAKE_LEARNING_WH') WITH WAREHOUSE_SIZE=? AUTO_SUSPEND=? COMMENT='Created by Snowflake during account provisioning';

label: GRANT
sql: GRANT ROLE IDENTIFIER('ORGADMIN') to user IDENTIFIER('FIRST_USER');

label: GRANT
sql: GRANT IMPORTED PRIVILEGES ON DATABASE IDENTIFIER('snowflake_sample_data') TO ROLE public;

label: CREATE
sql: CREATE OR REPLACE DATABASE IDENTIFIER('snowflake_sample_data') FROM SHARE IDENTIFIER('sfc_samples.sample_data') COMMENT=?
